revision.text:
{{afc comment|1=Used substitition to get all the templates into here relatively easily. On enwiki if you want the templates extract them out of this page to make templates, The jawiki system is too hard{{ill|User:Immanuelle|de|User:Immanuelle|ja|User:Immanuelle|zh|User:Immanuelle|lt=Immanuelle|lt_ja=Immanuelle|lt_de=Immanuelle|lt_zh=Immanuelle}} ({{ill|User talk:Immanuelle|de|User talk:Immanuelle|ja|User talk:Immanuelle|zh|User talk:Immanuelle|lt=talk|lt_ja=talk|lt_de=talk|lt_zh=talk}}) 05:35, 31 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=page target for move is at List of Shikinaisha in Shima Province{{ill|User:Immanuelle|de|User:Immanuelle|ja|User:Immanuelle|zh|User:Immanuelle|lt=Immanuelle|lt_ja=Immanuelle|lt_de=Immanuelle|lt_zh=Immanuelle}} ({{ill|User talk:Immanuelle|de|User talk:Immanuelle|ja|User talk:Immanuelle|zh|User talk:Immanuelle|lt=talk|lt_ja=talk|lt_de=talk|lt_zh=talk}}) 09:49, 26 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=page target for move is at {{ill|List of Shikinaisha in Shima Province|de|List of Shikinaisha in Shima Province|ja|List of Shikinaisha in Shima Province|zh|List of Shikinaisha in Shima Province}} - {{ill|User:Immanuelle|de|User:Immanuelle|ja|User:Immanuelle|zh|User:Immanuelle|lt=Immanuelle|lt_ja=Immanuelle|lt_de=Immanuelle|lt_zh=Immanuelle}} ({{ill|User talk:Immanuelle|de|User talk:Immanuelle|ja|User talk:Immanuelle|zh|User talk:Immanuelle|lt=talk|lt_ja=talk|lt_de=talk|lt_zh=talk}}) 09:48, 26 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=page target for move is at {{ill|List of Shikinaisha in Shima Province|de|List of Shikinaisha in Shima Province|ja|List of Shikinaisha in Shima Province|zh|List of Shikinaisha in Shima Province}} {{ill|User:Immanuelle|de|User:Immanuelle|ja|User:Immanuelle|zh|User:Immanuelle|lt=Immanuelle|lt_ja=Immanuelle|lt_de=Immanuelle|lt_zh=Immanuelle}} ({{ill|User talk:Immanuelle|de|User talk:Immanuelle|ja|User talk:Immanuelle|zh|User talk:Immanuelle|lt=talk|lt_ja=talk|lt_de=talk|lt_zh=talk}}) 09:48, 26 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=Switching over to deprecating the templates. So things might be a bit unexpected.{{ill|User:Immanuelle|de|User:Immanuelle|ja|User:Immanuelle|zh|User:Immanuelle|lt=Immanuelle|lt_ja=Immanuelle|lt_de=Immanuelle|lt_zh=Immanuelle}} ({{ill|User talk:Immanuelle|de|User talk:Immanuelle|ja|User talk:Immanuelle|zh|User talk:Immanuelle|lt=talk|lt_ja=talk|lt_de=talk|lt_zh=talk}}) 05:01, 18 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=If this is in the format "List of Shikinaisha in X" then I have linked all existing shrines into the table. Otherwise I have not. Translation of the texts will come later as it is a lot less difficult than the tables. Exception if there is another comment explaining the exception below{{ill|User:Immanuelle|de|User:Immanuelle|ja|User:Immanuelle|zh|User:Immanuelle|lt=Immanuelle|lt_ja=Immanuelle|lt_de=Immanuelle|lt_zh=Immanuelle}} ({{ill|User talk:Immanuelle|de|User talk:Immanuelle|ja|User talk:Immanuelle|zh|User talk:Immanuelle|lt=talk|lt_ja=talk|lt_de=talk|lt_zh=talk}}) 05:34, 17 March 2025 (UTC)}} '''List of Shikinai Shrines in Shima Province''' (志摩国の式内社一覧) is a list of {{ill|Shinto shrine|de|Shinto shrine|ja|神社|zh|Shinto shrine}} recorded in Volumes 9 and 10 "Kaminachō Jōge" of the {{ill|Engishiki|de|Engishiki|ja|Engishiki|zh|Engishiki}} ({{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|de|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|zh|Engishiki Jinmyōchō}}) that are known as {{ill|Shikinai Shrine|de|Shikinai Shrine|ja|式内社|1=Shikinaisha|zh|Shikinai Shrine}} and their {{ill|candidate shrines|de|candidate shrines|ja|論社|zh|candidate shrines}}, and are classified under the {{ill|Shima Province|de|Shima Province|ja|志摩国|zh|Shima Province}}. Additionally, it also notes shrines that existed at the time of the compilation of the {{ill|Engishiki|de|Engishiki|ja|延喜式|zh|Engishiki}} shrine listings but are not recorded therein, known as {{ill|Shikigai Shrine|de|Shikigai Shrine|ja|式外社|zh|Shikigai Shrine}}. A lot of these also appear as the 125 Shrines of Ise so the merge might have been bad == Shikinai Shrines == In the Engishiki shrine listings, 2 major complexes with 1 shrine and 1 minor complex with 1 shrine are recorded, making a total of 3 complexes and 2 shrines. {{List of Shikinaisha/Legend}} {| class="wikitable" style="background:#ffffff; font-size:85%" ! style="background:#a0f0a0" colspan=4 | {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|12=draft|12=draft}} ! style="background:#a0f0a0" colspan=3 | Designated Shrines ! style="background:#a0f0a0" rowspan=2 | Compilation |- style="white-space:nowrap;" ! style="background:#a0f0a0; padding-right:2.6em; padding-left:2.6em;" | Shrine Name ! style="background:#a0f0a0; padding-right:2.1em; padding-left:2.1em;" | Reading ! style="background:#a0f0a0; padding-right:2.1em; padding-left:2.1em;" | Rank ! style="background:#a0f0a0;" | Note ! style="background:#a0f0a0; padding-right:2.6em; padding-left:2.6em;" | Shrine Name ! style="background:#a0f0a0; padding-right:2.1em; padding-left:2.1em;" | Location ! style="background:#a0f0a0; padding-right:2.3em; padding-left:2.3em;" | Remarks |- |colspan=8 style="background-color:#ccffcc;"|'''{{ill|Tōshi District|de|Tōshi District|ja|答志郡|zh|Tōshi District}}''' 3 complexes (2 major, 1 minor) |- |rowspan=2 | '''粟島坐伊射波神社 二座''' ||rowspan=2 | ahashimano-isahano ||rowspan=2 | 並大 ||rowspan=2 | ||（{{ill|candidate shrines|ja|論社|lt=candidate shrines|12=draft|12=draft}}）{{ill|Izawa-no-miya|de|Izawa-no-miya|ja|Izawa-no-miya|zh|Izawa-no-miya|lt=Izawa-no-miya|lt_ja=Izawa-no-miya|lt_de=Izawa-no-miya|lt_zh=Izawa-no-miya}} || Mie Prefecture {{ill|Shima City|de|Shima City|ja|志摩市|zh|Shima City}} {{ill|Isobe-chō Kaminogō|de|Isobe-chō Kaminogō|ja|磯部町上之郷|zh|Isobe-chō Kaminogō}} || {{ill|Shima Province|de|Shima Province|ja|志摩国|zh|Shima Province}} {{ill|Ichinomiya|de|Ichinomiya|ja|一宮|zh|Ichinomiya}}
{{ill|Kōtaiga Shrine|de|Kōtaiga Shrine|ja|皇大神宮|zh|Kōtaiga Shrine}} 別宮 ||[http://21coe.kokugakuin.ac.jp/db/jinja/000007.html] |- |（{{ill|candidate shrines|ja|論社|lt=candidate shrines|12=draft|12=draft}}）{{ill|Izawa-jinja|de|Izawa-jinja|ja|Izawa-jinja|zh|Izawa-jinja}} || Mie Prefecture {{ill|Toba City|de|Toba City|ja|鳥羽市|zh|Toba City}} 安楽島町 ||（志摩国一宮） ||[http://21coe.kokugakuin.ac.jp/db/jinja/086001.html] |- |'''同島坐神乎多乃御子神社''' || onashikishimanimasukamuwotanomikono

12 revisions imported: Bot: import full history from ja:志摩国の式内社一覧 up to rev 56551055
revision.text:
'''志摩国の式内社一覧'''（しまのくにのしきないしゃいちらん）は、『[[延喜式]]』第9巻・第10巻「神名帳上下」（[[延喜式神名帳]]）に記載のある[[神社]]、いわゆる「[[式内社]]」およびその[[論社]]のうち、[[志摩国]]に分類されている神社の一覧。 また『延喜式』神名帳の編纂当時に存在したが同帳に記載の無い神社、いわゆる「[[式外社]]」についても付記する。 == 式内社 == 『延喜式』神名帳では、大社2座1社・小社1座1社の計3座2社を記載。 {{式内社一覧/凡例}} {{式内社一覧/header}} |colspan=8 style="background-color:#ccffcc;"|'''[[答志郡]]''' 3座（大2座・小1座） |- |rowspan=2 | '''粟島坐伊射波神社 二座'''||rowspan=2 | アハシマノ-イサハノ||rowspan=2 | 並大||rowspan=2 | ||（論）[[伊雑宮]]||三重県[[志摩市]][[磯部町上之郷]]||志摩国[[一宮]]
[[皇大神宮]]別宮||[http://21coe.kokugakuin.ac.jp/db/jinja/000007.html] |- |（論）[[伊射波神社]]||三重県[[鳥羽市]]安楽島町||（志摩国一宮）||[http://21coe.kokugakuin.ac.jp/db/jinja/086001.html] |- |'''同島坐神乎多乃御子神社'''||オナシキシマニマスカムヲタノミコノ
-カミヲタノミコノ||小||||[[佐美長神社]]||三重県志摩市[[磯部町恵利原]]||伊雑宮所管社|| |} == 式外社 == {{節stub}} 『延喜式』神名帳の編纂当時に存在したが、同帳に記載の無い神社。 == 参考文献 == * 皇典講究所・全国神職会校訂[{{NDLDC|1442211/160}} 『延喜式 上巻』]（大岡山書店、昭和4年） - 国立国会図書館デジタルコレクション * [{{NDLDC|1273537/37}} 『延喜式 第2』]（日本古典全集刊行会、昭和4年） - 国立国会図書館デジタルコレクション == 外部リンク == * [http://21coe.kokugakuin.ac.jp/db/jinja/jinjastate08.html 志摩国 式内社3座] - 國學院大學21世紀COEプログラム「神道・神社史料集成」 {{式内社一覧}} {{DEFAULTSORT:しまのくにのしきないしやいちらん}} [[Category:志摩国の式内社|*]] [[Category:式内社の一覧]]

'''志摩国の式内社一覧'''（しまのくにのしきないしゃいちらん）は、『[[延喜式]]』第9巻・第10巻「神名帳上下」（[[延喜式神名帳]]）に記載のある[[神社]]、いわゆる「[[式内社]]」およびその[[論社]]のうち、[[志摩国]]に分類されている神社の一覧。 また『延喜式』神名帳の編纂当時に存在したが同帳に記載の無い神社、いわゆる「[[式外社]]」についても付記する。 == 式内社 == 『延喜式』神名帳では、大社2座1社・小社1座1社の計3座2社を記載。 {{式内社一覧/凡例}} {{式内社一覧/header}} |colspan=8 style="background-color:#ccffcc;"|'''[[答志郡]]''' 3座（大2座・小1座） |- |rowspan=2 | '''粟島坐伊射波神社 二座'''||rowspan=2 | アハシマノ-イサハノ||rowspan=2 | 並大||rowspan=2 | ||（論）[[伊雑宮]]||三重県[[志摩市]][[磯部町上之郷]]||志摩国[[一宮]]
[[皇大神宮]]別宮||[http://21coe.kokugakuin.ac.jp/db/jinja/000007.html] |- |（論）[[伊射波神社]]||三重県[[鳥羽市]]安楽島町||（志摩国一宮）||[http://21coe.kokugakuin.ac.jp/db/jinja/086001.html] |- |'''同島坐神乎多乃御子神社'''||オナシキシマニマスカムヲタノミコノ
-カミヲタノミコノ||小||||[[佐美長神社]]||三重県志摩市[[磯部町恵利原]]||伊雑宮所管社|| |} == 式外社 == {{節stub}} 『延喜式』神名帳の編纂当時に存在したが、同帳に記載の無い神社。 == 参考文献 == * 皇典講究所・全国神職会校訂[{{NDLDC|1442211/160}} 『延喜式 上巻』]（大岡山書店、昭和4年） - 国立国会図書館デジタルコレクション * [{{NDLDC|1273537/37}} 『延喜式 第2』]（日本古典全集刊行会、昭和4年） - 国立国会図書館デジタルコレクション == 外部リンク == * [http://21coe.kokugakuin.ac.jp/db/jinja/jinjastate08.html 志摩国 式内社3座] - 國學院大學21世紀COEプログラム「神道・神社史料集成」 {{式内社一覧}} {{DEFAULTSORT:しまのくにのしきないしやいちらん}} [[Category:志摩国の式内社|*]] [[Category:式内社の一覧]]

revision.text:
This is a '''List of Shikinaisha in Shima Province'''. Or the list of shrines in [[Shima Province]] which is present in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft}}. On this page we will also cover the {{ill|Shikigeisha|ja|式外社|1=Shikigeisha|qq=draft}} of [[Shima Province]] which are shrines that are known to have existed at that time due to other historical records, such as the [[Rikkokushi]], but for some reason were excluded from the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft}}. We will cover them in a separate list to avoid confusion. == Shikinai Shrines (式内社) == In the Engishiki shrine listings, 2 major complexes with 1 shrine and 1 minor complex with 1 shrine are recorded, making a total of 3 complexes and 2 shrines. {{List of Shikinaisha/Legend}} {| class="wikitable" style="background:#ffffff; font-size:85%" ! style="background:#a0f0a0" colspan=4 | {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|ja|延喜式神名帳|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|qq=draft}} ! style="background:#a0f0a0" colspan=3 | Designated Shrines ! style="background:#a0f0a0" rowspan=2 | Compilation |- style="white-space:nowrap;" ! style="background:#a0f0a0; padding-right:2.6em; padding-left:2.6em;" | Shrine Name ! revision.text:
This is a '''List of Shikinaisha in Shima Province'''. Or the list of shrines in [[Shima Province]] which is present in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}}. On this page we will also cover the {{ill|Shikigeisha|ja|式外社|1=Shikigeisha|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|qq=}} of [[Shima Province]] which are shrines that are known to have existed at that time due to other historical records, such as the [[Rikkokushi]], but for some reason were excluded from the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}}. We will cover them in a separate list to avoid confusion. == Shikinaisha (式内社) == In the Engishiki shrine listings, 2 major complexes with 1 shrine and 1 minor complex with 1 shrine are recorded, making a total of 3 complexes and 2 shrines. {{List of Shikinaisha/Legend}} {| class="wikitable" style="background:#ffffff; font-size:85%" ! revision.comment: Text replacement - "Engishiki Jinmyocho" to "Engishiki Jinmyōchō"
revision.text:
This is a '''List of Shikinaisha in Shima Province'''. Or the list of shrines in [[Shima Province]] which is present in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}}. On this page we will also cover the {{ill|Shikigeisha|ja|式外社|1=Shikigeisha|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|qq=}} of [[Shima Province]] which are shrines that are known to have existed at that time due to other historical records, such as the [[Rikkokushi]], but for some reason were excluded from the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}}. We will cover them in a separate list to avoid confusion. == Shikinaisha (式内社) == In the Engishiki shrine listings, 2 major complexes with 1 shrine and 1 minor complex with 1 shrine are recorded, making a total of 3 complexes and 2 shrines. {{List of Shikinaisha/Legend}} {| class="wikitable" style="background:#ffffff; font-size:85%" ! style="background:#a0f0a0" colspan=4 | {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}} ! style="background:#a0f0a0; padding-right:2.1em; padding-left:2.1em;" | Reading ! style="background:#a0f0a0; padding-right:2.1em; padding-left:2.1em;" | Rank ! style="background:#a0f0a0;" | Note ! style="background:#a0f0a0; padding-right:2.6em; padding-left:2.6em;" | Shrine Name ! revision.comment: Bot: append Wikidata-derived interwikis
revision.text:
This is a '''List of Shikinaisha in Shima Province'''. Or the list of shrines in [[Shima Province]] which is present in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}}. On this page we will also cover the {{ill|Shikigeisha|ja|式外社|1=Shikigeisha|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|qq=}} of [[Shima Province]] which are shrines that are known to have existed at that time due to other historical records, such as the [[Rikkokushi]], but for some reason were excluded from the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}}. We will cover them in a separate list to avoid confusion. == Shikinaisha (式内社) == In the Engishiki shrine listings, 2 major complexes with 1 shrine and 1 minor complex with 1 shrine are recorded, making a total of 3 complexes and 2 shrines. {{List of Shikinaisha/Legend}} {| class="wikitable" style="background:#ffffff; font-size:85%" ! revision.text:
This is a '''List of Shikinaisha in Shima Province'''. Or the list of shrines in [[Shima Province]] which is present in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}}. On this page we will also cover the {{ill|Shikigeisha|ja|式外社|1=Shikigeisha|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 延喜式神名帳|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} of [[Shima Province]] which are shrines that are known to have existed at that time due to other historical records, such as the [[Rikkokushi]], but for some reason were excluded from the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}}. We will cover them in a separate list to avoid confusion. == Shikinaisha (式内社) == In the Engishiki shrine listings, 2 major complexes with 1 shrine and 1 minor complex with 1 shrine are recorded, making a total of 3 complexes and 2 shrines. {{List of Shikinaisha/Legend}} {| class="wikitable" style="background:#ffffff; font-size:85%" ! style="background:#a0f0a0" colspan=4 | {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}} ! {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q11490919]] Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 07:55, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} This is a '''List of Shikinaisha in Shima Province'''. Or the list of shrines in [[:en:Shima Province|Shima Province]] which is present in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}}. On this page we will also cover the {{ill|Shikigeisha|ja|式外社|1=Shikigeisha|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 延喜式神名帳|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} of [[:en:Shima Province|Shima Province]] which are shrines that are known to have existed at that time due to other historical records, such as the [[Rikkokushi]], but for some reason were excluded from the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}}. We will cover them in a separate list to avoid confusion. == Shikinaisha (式内社) == In the Engishiki shrine listings, 2 major complexes with 1 shrine and 1 minor complex with 1 shrine are recorded, making a total of 3 complexes and 2 shrines. {{List of Shikinaisha/Legend}} {| class="wikitable" style="background:#ffffff; font-size:85%" ! style="background:#a0f0a0" colspan=4 | {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}} ! {afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q11490919]]} This is a '''List of Shikinaisha in Shima Province''' or the list of shrines in [[Shima Province]] which is present in the {ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}

They are shown in a separate table to avoid confusion.
The ''Engishiki'' counts **3 shikinaisha** in the province – **1 shosha** and **2 taisha**.

On this page we will also cover the {{ill|Shikigeisha|ja|式外社|1=Shikigeisha|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 延喜式神名帳|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} of [[Shima Province]] which are shrines that are known to have existed at that time due to other historical records, such as the [[Rikkokushi]], but for some reason were excluded from the Engishiki list. They are shown in a separate table to avoid confusion.
The ''Engishiki'' counts 3 {{ill|Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} in the province – 1 {{ill|Shikinai Shosha|WD=Q134917287}} and 2 {{ill|Shikinai Taisha|WD=Q134917288}}.
== Shikinaisha (式内社) == {| class="wikitable sortable" ! Prov !! Name !! Kana !! Rank |- | 1 || {{ill|Ahashimano-isahano shrine|WD=Q135039455}} || アハシマノ-イサハノ || |- | 2 || {{ill|Saminaga Shrine|WD=Q17209205}} || || Shikinai Shosha |}
== Shikigeisha (式外社) == ''(none listed)''
== References ==
{{translated page|ja|志摩国の式内社一覧|version=56551055|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{List of Shikinaisha}} [[ja:志摩国の式内社一覧]] [[d:Q11490919]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Shima Province]] [[Category:Lists of Shikinaisha by location]]

{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q11490919]]
[[:ja:志摩国の式内社一覧]]
[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:45, 28 June 2025 (UTC)}} This is a '''List of Shikinaisha in Shima Province''' or the list of shrines in [[Shima Province]] which is present in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}}
On this page we will also cover the {{ill|Shikigeisha|ja|式外社|1=Shikigeisha|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 延喜式神名帳|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} of [[Shima Province]] which are shrines that are known to have existed at that time due to other historical records, such as the [[Rikkokushi]], but for some reason were excluded from the Engishiki list. They are shown in a separate table to avoid confusion.
The {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}} counts 3 {{ill|Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} in the province – 1 {{ill|Shikinai Shosha|WD=Q134917287}} and 2 {{ill|Shikinai Taisha|WD=Q134917288}}.
== Shikinaisha (式内社) == {| class="wikitable sortable" ! Prov !! Name !! Kana !! Rank !! Shrine DB |- | 1 | {{ill|Ahashimano-isahano shrine|WD=Q135039455}} | アハシマノ-イサハノ | — | [ https://web.archive.org/web/20060723183647/http://21coe.kokugakuin.ac.jp:80/db/jinja/000007.html archive ] |- | 2 | {{ill|Saminaga Shrine|WD=Q17209205}} | | Shikinai Shosha | — |}
== Shikigeisha (式外社) == ''(none listed)''

[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:28, 3 July 2025 (UTC)}} This is a '''List of Shikinaisha in Shima Province''' or the list of shrines in [[Shima Province]] which is present in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}}
On this page we will also cover the {{ill|Shikigeisha|ja|式外社|1=Shikigeisha|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 延喜式神名帳|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} of [[Shima Province]] which are shrines that are known to have existed at that time due to other historical records, such as the [[Rikkokushi]], but for some reason were excluded from the Engishiki list. They are shown in a separate table to avoid confusion.
The {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}} counts 3 {{ill|Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} in the province – 1 {{ill|Shikinai Shosha|WD=Q134917287}} and 2 {{ill|Shikinai Taisha|WD=Q134917288}}.

On this page we will also cover the {{ill|Shikigeisha|ja|式外社|1=Shikigeisha|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 延喜式神名帳|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} of [[Shima Province]] which are shrines that are known to have existed at that time due to other historical records, such as the [[Rikkokushi]], but for some reason were excluded from the Engishiki list. They are shown in a separate table to avoid confusion.
The {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}} counts 3 {{ill|Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} in the province – 1 {{ill|Shikinai Shosha|WD=Q134917287}} and 2 {{ill|Shikinai Taisha|WD=Q134917288}}.

On this page we will also cover the {{ill|Shikigeisha|ja|式外社|1=Shikigeisha|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 延喜式神名帳|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} of [[Shima Province]] which are shrines that are known to have existed at that time due to other historical records, such as the [[Rikkokushi]], but for some reason were excluded from the Engishiki list. They are shown in a separate table to avoid confusion.
The {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}} counts 3 {{ill|Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} in the province – 1 {{ill|Shikinai Shosha|WD=Q134917287}} and 2 {{ill|Shikinai Taisha|WD=Q134917288}}.
== Shikinaisha (式内社) == {| class="wikitable sortable" ! Global !! Prov !! District !! Name !! Kana !! Rank !! Shrine DB !! Celebration !! Seats !! Subtype !! Parent shrine !! On this page we will also cover the {{ill|Shikigeisha|ja|式外社|1=Shikigeisha|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 延喜式神名帳|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} of [[Shima Province]] which are shrines that are known to have existed at that time due to other historical records, such as the [[Rikkokushi]], but for some reason were excluded from the Engishiki list. They are shown in a separate table to avoid confusion.
The {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}} counts 3 {{ill|Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} in the province – 1 {{ill|Shikinai Shosha|WD=Q134917287}} and 2 {{ill|Shikinai Taisha|WD=Q134917288}}.
== Shikinaisha (式内社) == {| class="wikitable sortable" ! Global !! Prov !! District !! Name !! Kana !! Rank !! Shrine DB !! Celebration !! Seats !! Subtype !! Parent shrine !! On this page we will also cover the {{ill|Shikigeisha|ja|式外社|1=Shikigeisha|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 延喜式神名帳|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} of [[Shima Province]] which are shrines that are known to have existed at that time due to other historical records, such as the [[Rikkokushi]], but for some reason were excluded from the Engishiki list. They are shown in a separate table to avoid confusion.
The {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}} counts 3 {{ill|Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} in the province – 1 {{ill|Shikinai Shosha|WD=Q134917287}} and 2 {{ill|Shikinai Taisha|WD=Q134917288}}.
== Shikinaisha (式内社) == {| class="wikitable sortable" ! Global !! Prov !! District !! Name !! Kana !! Rank !! Shrine DB !! Celebration !! Seats !! Subtype !! Parent shrine !! This is a list of Shikinaisha in [[Shima Province]]. That is the shrines in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]] in the province.

The Engishiki Jinmyōchō counts 3 Shikinaisha in the province – 1 Shikinai Shosha and 2 Shikinai Taisha.

The Engishiki Jinmyōchō counts 3 Shikinaisha in the province – 1 Shikinai Shosha and 2 Shikinai Taisha.

{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q11490919]]

[[:ja:志摩国の式内社一覧]]

[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 22:19, 16 February 2026 (UTC)}}
This is a list of Shikinaisha in [[Shima Province]]. That is the shrines in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]] in the province.

The Engishiki Jinmyōchō counts 3 Shikinaisha in the province – 1 Shikinai Shosha and 2 Shikinai Taisha.
